title: aster nitidulus
intro: Aster nitidulus, also known as smooth aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and fight infections. The health benefits of Aster nitidulus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aster nitidulus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
